'''âv-sh-dh''' ('''kavashadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calumny|calumny]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-sh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calumny|calumny]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-sh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kavashadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivashadh|thivashadh]] || [[word:jivashadh|jivashadh]] || [[word:shivashadh|shivashadh]] || [[word:kivashadh|kivashadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvashadh|thuthuvashadh]] || [[word:jujuvashadh|jujuvashadh]] || [[word:shushuvashadh|shushuvashadh]] || [[word:kukuvashadh|kukuvashadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvashadh|thuvashadh]] || [[word:juvashadh|juvashadh]] || [[word:shuvashadh|shuvashadh]] || [[word:kuvashadh|kuvashadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvashadh|thuvashadh]] || [[word:juvashadh|juvashadh]] || [[word:shuvashadh|shuvashadh]] || [[word:kuvashadh|kuvashadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevashadh|thevashadh]] || [[word:jevashadh|jevashadh]] || [[word:shevashadh|shevashadh]] || [[word:kevashadh|kevashadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovashadh|thothovashadh]] || [[word:jojovashadh|jojovashadh]] || [[word:shoshovashadh|shoshovashadh]] || [[word:kokovashadh|kokovashadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovashadh|thovashadh]] || [[word:jovashadh|jovashadh]] || [[word:shovashadh|shovashadh]] || [[word:kovashadh|kovashadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovashadh|thovashadh]] || [[word:jovashadh|jovashadh]] || [[word:shovashadh|shovashadh]] || [[word:kovashadh|kovashadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvashadh|thĂŠvashadh]] || [[word:jĂŠvashadh|jĂŠvashadh]] || [[word:shĂŠvashadh|shĂŠvashadh]] || [[word:kĂŠvashadh|kĂŠvashadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavashadh|thathavashadh]] || [[word:jajavashadh|jajavashadh]] || [[word:shashavashadh|shashavashadh]] || [[word:kakavashadh|kakavashadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavashadh|thavashadh]] || [[word:javashadh|javashadh]] || [[word:shavashadh|shavashadh]] || [[word:kavashadh|kavashadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavashadh|thavashadh]] || [[word:javashadh|javashadh]] || [[word:shavashadh|shavashadh]] || [[word:kavashadh|kavashadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavashadh|shavashadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavashadh|goshavashadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavashadh|gokishavashadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavashadhnĂŒ|shavashadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavashadhnknĂŒ|goshavashadhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavashadhnĂŒ|gokishavashadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavashadhshĂ«|shavashadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavashadhnkshĂ«|goshavashadhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavashadhshĂ«|gokishavashadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavashadhro|shavashadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavashadhnkro|goshavashadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavashadhro|gokishavashadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavashadhmu|shavashadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavashadhnkmu|goshavashadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavashadhmu|gokishavashadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavashadhsher|shavashadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavashadhnksher|goshavashadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavashadhsher|gokishavashadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavashadhng|shavashadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavashadhnkng|goshavashadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavashadhng|gokishavashadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavashadhya|shavashadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavashadhnkya|goshavashadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavashadhya|gokishavashadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavashadhyam|shavashadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavashadhnkyam|goshavashadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavashadhyam|gokishavashadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavashadhnĂŒshĂ«|shavashadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavashadhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavashadhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavashadhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavashadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavashadhnĂŒro|shavashadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavashadhnknĂŒro|goshavashadhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavashadhnĂŒro|gokishavashadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavashadhnĂŒmu|shavashadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavashadhnknĂŒmu|goshavashadhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavashadhnĂŒmu|gokishavashadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavashadhshĂ«nĂŒ|shavashadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavashadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavashadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavashadhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavashadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavashadhshĂ«ro|shavashadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavashadhnkshĂ«ro|goshavashadhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavashadhshĂ«ro|gokishavashadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavashadhshĂ«mu|shavashadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavashadhnkshĂ«mu|goshavashadhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavashadhshĂ«mu|gokishavashadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavashadhronĂŒ|shavashadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavashadhnkronĂŒ|goshavashadhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavashadhronĂŒ|gokishavashadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavashadhroshĂ«|shavashadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavashadhnkroshĂ«|goshavashadhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavashadhroshĂ«|gokishavashadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavashadhromu|shavashadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavashadhnkromu|goshavashadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavashadhromu|gokishavashadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavashadhmunĂŒ|shavashadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavashadhnkmunĂŒ|goshavashadhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavashadhmunĂŒ|gokishavashadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavashadhmushĂ«|shavashadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavashadhnkmushĂ«|goshavashadhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavashadhmushĂ«|gokishavashadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavashadhmuro|shavashadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavashadhnkmuro|goshavashadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavashadhmuro|gokishavashadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
